title: The Enchanted Lake That Changes Colors

scenes.text: This lake’s colors shift with sunlight and seasons.
This is Lake Cauma, nestled in the heart of the Swiss Alps.
The lake's vibrant hues come from its mineral-rich water.
It’s surrounded by lush conifer forests.
scenes.label: THE SURROUNDING FOREST

scenes.text: Follow if you love to travel from your screen.

description: 📍 Lake Cauma, Graubünden - Switzerland. A breathtaking lake that transforms colors with the light. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
